metadata.name: Handle Wave Picking for Multiple Orders

description: A warehouse manager wants to improve picking efficiency by creating a 'wave' to pick items for multiple orders at once.

nodes.task_description: Select a group of orders to be included in the picking wave.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects 20 small orders that are all shipping via the same carrier.

nodes.task_description: The system consolidates all items from all orders in the wave into a single, optimized pick list.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates one master pick list for the entire wave.

nodes.task_description: A worker picks all the items in the wave and brings them to a central packing area.

expected_outcome.value: The worker completes the master pick list.

nodes.task_description: At the packing station, the items are sorted and packed into their individual orders.
